title: Upload TSA certificate
description: Install an externally obtained RFC 3161 timestamping certificate

chain.title: Certificate chain (PEM)
chain.description: Leaf certificate first, followed by any intermediates and the root, PEM encoded

key.title: Private key (PEM, PKCS#8)
key.description: Private key matching the leaf certificate, PEM encoded (PKCS#8, optionally encrypted)

passphrase.title: Key passphrase
passphrase.description: Passphrase protecting the private key, empty if the key is unencrypted
